heading: Disbursement of funds of military department to cover obligation of another agency of Department of Defense
label: 2206 Disbursement of funds of military department to cover obligation of another agency of Department of Defense
text: As far as authorized by the Secretary of Defense, a disbursing official of a military department may, out of available advances, make disbursements to cover obligations in connection with any function, power, or duty of another department or agency of the Department of Defense and charge those disbursements on vouchers, to the appropriate appropriation of that department or agency. Disbursements so made shall be adjusted in settling the accounts of the disbursing official.

The last sentence is substituted for the proviso in .5 U.S.C. 172h
Amendments1982— substituted “official” for “officer” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 97–258
